effective_state.authority_statement: This artifact is a repo-native derivative of config-surface proof state, the chat_ci render surface, provider profiles, and the projection pack. It is not a provider-runtime export, a synchronization mechanism, or a sovereign source of truth.

manual_export_constraints.human_copy_only_note: A human may copy a derivative pack into a provider UI, but the repo remains the only durable source and any relied-on copy or material repack requires a new append-only receipt.

human_actions_required: Render or select the repo-native pack for the target provider slot layout.
Record a new receipt if a human copy or material repack becomes relied on.
disallowed_actions: No browser automation or scripted form fill.
No provider-local edits treated as durable truth.

declared_omissions: No provider-local copy has been recorded by this artifact.

notes: First append-only readiness receipt for the chat_ci manual-export family. The family remains repo-sovereign, manual-only, and explicitly non-automated.
